raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.5,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.1":"The contribution claim is present but narrowly stated and partially redundant with the summary; improving the draft plausibly includes sharpening the gap statement and positioning the AIPW+causal-forest combination as the novel methodological package, though whether this rises to load-bearing depends on the interpretation of the delegation.","R1.2":"A causal-estimation draft requires coherence across identification assumptions, estimator choice, sensitivity analysis, and conclusions; 'improve' in a technical context normally encompasses this — the unconfoundedness caveat, the Rosenbaum-bounds framing, and the heterogeneity claims must hang together consistently, making this a central expected responsibility.","R1.6":"Writing polish is the unambiguous minimum reading of 'improve this draft'; sentence precision, paragraph flow, and terminological consistency are load-bearing regardless of any other interpretation."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the improvement cover writing clarity and prose quality only, or should it also include reviewing the methodological and causal-reasoning soundness (identification assumptions, estimator validity, sensitivity-analysis interpretation, HTE claims)?"}

rationale.R1.1: The contribution claim is present but narrowly stated and partially redundant with the summary; improving the draft plausibly includes sharpening the gap statement and positioning the AIPW+causal-forest combination as the novel methodological package, though whether this rises to load-bearing depends on the interpretation of the delegation.
rationale.R1.2: A causal-estimation draft requires coherence across identification assumptions, estimator choice, sensitivity analysis, and conclusions; 'improve' in a technical context normally encompasses this — the unconfoundedness caveat, the Rosenbaum-bounds framing, and the heterogeneity claims must hang together consistently, making this a central expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the unambiguous minimum reading of 'improve this draft'; sentence precision, paragraph flow, and terminological consistency are load-bearing regardless of any other interpretation.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the improvement cover writing clarity and prose quality only, or should it also include reviewing the methodological and causal-reasoning soundness (identification assumptions, estimator validity, sensitivity-analysis interpretation, HTE claims)?
